paragraph: The perturbation's effect wвҠӨО·w^\top \etawвҠӨО· can be maximized by setting О·=ПөвӢ…sign(w)\eta = \epsilon \cdot \text{sign}(w)О·=ПөвӢ…sign(w). In nnn dimensions with average weight magnitude mmm, the activation change is Пөmn\epsilon m nПөmn, which grows linearly with dimensionality.
originalText: The perturbation's effect wвҠӨО·w^\top \etawвҠӨО· can be maximized by setting О·=ПөвӢ…sign(w)\eta = \epsilon \cdot \text{sign}(w)О·=ПөвӢ…sign(w). In nnn dimensions with average weight magnitude mmm, the activation change is Пөmn\epsilon m nПөmn, which grows linearly with dimensionality.
